outlines.title: The Letter
outlines.logline: Mira reopens the case after finding a sealed letter.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira finds a sealed letter and decides to act.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must decide whether to reopen a dangerous case.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira chooses action instead of silence.
outlines.cliffhanger: The hidden letter points toward Rowan.

outlines.title: Archive Before Dawn
outlines.logline: Rowan hides the letter before Mira can expose him.
outlines.opening_hook: Rowan slips into the archive before dawn.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must connect Rowan to the missing letter.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira realizes Rowan is afraid of what the letter proves.
outlines.cliffhanger: The archive trail suggests Rowan moved more than one piece of evidence.

outlines.title: The Hidden Evidence
outlines.logline: Mira links the letter to Rowan's archive cover-up.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira compares the letter with Rowan's dawn archive move.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan without losing the only proof.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira turns the private clue into leverage.
outlines.cliffhanger: Rowan's archive move reveals a second hidden trail.

outlines.title: Second Trail
outlines.logline: The archive clue opens another path in the old case.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira sees that Rowan's hiding place was chosen carefully.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must follow the archive trail before Rowan erases it.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira confirms the letter was meant to restart the case.
outlines.cliffhanger: A second archive marker points beyond Rowan.

outlines.title: Proof Under Pressure
outlines.logline: Mira protects the letter while Rowan tries to control the archive.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira keeps the sealed letter close as the archive closes in.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must prove Rowan hid the evidence before dawn.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira understands that the letter was a call to fight back.
outlines.cliffhanger: The archive record shows a missing handoff.

outlines.title: Missing Handoff
outlines.logline: Mira follows the missing archive handoff back to Rowan.
outlines.opening_hook: The archive record leaves one dawn movement unexplained.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must force Rowan to account for the hidden letter.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira sees the shape of the cover-up.
outlines.cliffhanger: The hidden letter names a case that should have stayed closed.

outlines.title: The Old Case
outlines.logline: The sealed letter pulls Mira deeper into the old case.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira rereads the letter as Rowan's archive move gains meaning.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must reopen the case while Rowan guards the proof.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira accepts that silence protects Rowan.
outlines.cliffhanger: The archive proof suggests Rowan was hiding evidence for someone else.

outlines.title: For Someone Else
outlines.logline: Mira suspects Rowan's archive move protected a larger secret.
outlines.opening_hook: Rowan's dawn action no longer looks like a private choice.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must keep the letter safe while tracing who benefits.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira turns suspicion into a plan.
outlines.cliffhanger: The letter's timing exposes a second watcher.

outlines.title: Second Watcher
outlines.logline: Mira uses the letter and archive clue to draw out another watcher.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira stages the sealed letter where Rowan can see it.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must pressure Rowan without losing control of the proof.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira realizes the old case can still be exposed.

outlines.title: Before Dawn
outlines.logline: Mira confronts the meaning of Rowan's dawn archive move.
outlines.opening_hook: Before dawn, Mira returns to the archive with the sealed letter.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must expose Rowan's hidden evidence before it disappears again.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira turns the letter into public leverage.
outlines.cliffhanger: The next case file opens with Mira's name.
